code: import React from'react';import{useApp}from'../../context/AppContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TABS=[{id:'dashboard',label:'📊 Dashboard'},{id:'questions',label:'🧠 प्रश्न'},{id:'images',label:'🖼️ चित्र'},{id:'participants',label:'👥 प्रतिभागी'},{id:'members',label:'🪪 सदस्य'},{id:'donations',label:'💰 दान'},{id:'settings',label:'⚙️ Settings'}];export default function AdminTabs(_ref){let{active,onChange}=_ref;const{members}=useApp();const pendingCount=members.filter(m=>m.status==='pending').length;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"admin-tabs",children:TABS.map(tab=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:`admin-tab ${active===tab.id?'admin-tab--active':''}`,onClick:()=>onChange(tab.id),children:[tab.label,tab.id==='members'&&pendingCount>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"admin-tab__badge",children:pendingCount})]},tab.id))});}
